text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite not hitting her bulking goals yet, I decide
that we're going to enter the Satsuki Sho, the first
of the Classic Triple Crown races.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, my body's definitely not as big as the other
racers... But more importantly...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
What is this, a catwalk?! Ya stand out way too
much, City.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
D-do I? I wasn't exactly trying to. I'm more
focused on the race.

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Wow, I knew she was gorgeous, but she looks so
much better in person! I bet she's eye-catching on
the track too.

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Tamamo Cross, on the other hand... She looks
kinda weak.

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
I heard that runners with looks like hers don't
tend to find much success...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, whoa, whoa! Quit judgin' this book by her
cover!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Hope you're hungry, 'cause you're gonna be eatin' those words! Listen up, City. When it comes to Umamusume, looks don't matter.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
With my running, I'm gonna have this whole venue
tremblin'!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: No! They're gonna be tremblin' with awe! But that was a good joke, I'll give ya that!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Just make sure ya drop the stooge act before the
race starts! 'Cause once I hit that final stretch,
you're not gonna be makin' anymore comebacks!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tamamo Cross is primed and ready as she heads
to the turf. I'm looking forward to her heated
showdown with Gold City.
